reference_sql: WITH stake_conc AS (  SELECT netuid,     MAX(stake) / NULLIF(SUM(stake), 0) AS max_stake_share   FROM metagraph   GROUP BY netuid), miner_counts AS (  SELECT netuid, COUNT(*) AS active_miners   FROM miners   WHERE active = true   GROUP BY netuid) SELECT sc.netuid, sc.max_stake_share, mc.active_miners FROM stake_conc sc JOIN miner_counts mc ON sc.netuid = mc.netuid ORDER BY sc.max_stake_share DESC
